title: 2026 Oscars Best Supporting Actor Winner
text: Winner: Sean Penn won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for his role as Colonel Steven J. Lockjaw in Paul Thomas Anderson's film One Battle After Another. This victory marks a historic milestone for Penn. He has now joined an elite group of eight actors in Academy Awards history to win at least three acting Oscars, alongside figures such as Meryl Streep, Jack Nicholson, and Daniel Day-Lewis. The Nominees: Sean Penn (One Battle After Another), Benicio Del Toro (One Battle After Another), Stellan Skarsgard (Sentimental Value), Delroy Lindo (Sinners), Jacob Elordi (Frankenstein). Context: Penn's portrayal of the despicable Colonel Lockjaw initially faced resistance but ultimately surpassed his more charismatic co-star Benicio Del Toro and the great Stellan Skarsgard to secure the award.
